description_long: This is a modern suburban house set within a rectangular fenced lot, featuring a two-story structure with a gable roof. The front yard is landscaped with two large trees and a driveway leading to a covered carport. The backyard includes a swimming pool, a circular water tank, and a paved patio area with pergola-style shading. The house exterior is finished in light gray tones with multiple windows of varying sizes, and the property is bordered by a low wall. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with a focus on outdoor living spaces and privacy. The lot is well-maintained, with green lawns and shrubbery accentuating the residential character.
description: A modern two-story house with a gable roof, landscaped front yard, driveway, and a backyard featuring a pool and patio. The property is enclosed by a low wall and surrounded by greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, carport, main entrance, and two large trees flanking the entryway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the backyard patio, pool, and water tank, with the fence enclosing the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard amenities, including the swimming pool, patio with pergola, and the back facade of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's side elevation, additional landscaping, and the full extent of the fenced lot.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entry with a single main door, small porch, and flanked by landscaping and a driveway
